name: Coconut Shrimp#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, devein, and wash the shrimp. Dry well on paper towels. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, mix together all dry ingredients for batter: flour, cornstarch, salt, and white pepper.
3. Add 2 tablespoons of oil and ice water to the dry mixture. Stir to blend until smooth.
4. Heat oil to 350°F (175°C) in a deep fryer or electric skillet.
5. Spread coconut evenly on a flat pan, adding more as needed.
6. Dip each shrimp individually into the batter, then roll in coconut.
7. Fry the coated shrimp in hot oil until lightly browned, about 4 minutes.
8. Remove from oil and place on paper towels to drain excess fat.
9. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for an additional 5 minutes to finish cooking the shrimp.
10. Serve with sweet and sour sauce or the following sauce: combine marmalade, Grey Poupon mustard, honey, and Tobasco sauce to taste.
